launchd.name: default
launchd.output:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd">
<plist version="1.0">
<dict>
  <key>Label</key>
  <string>com.wayfinder-router.gateway</string>
  <key>ProgramArguments</key>
  <array>
      <string>/usr/local/bin/wayfinder-router</string>
      <string>serve</string>
      <string>--port</string>
      <string>8088</string>
  </array>
  <key>RunAtLoad</key>
  <true/>
  <key>KeepAlive</key>
  <true/>
  <key>StandardOutPath</key>
  <string>/Users/compat-user/Library/Logs/wayfinder-router.log</string>
  <key>StandardErrorPath</key>
  <string>/Users/compat-user/Library/Logs/wayfinder-router.err.log</string>
</dict>
</plist>

launchd.label: com.example.compat
launchd.name: escaping-and-custom-log
launchd.output:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd">
<plist version="1.0">
<dict>
  <key>Label</key>
  <string>com.example.compat</string>
  <key>ProgramArguments</key>
  <array>
      <string>/opt/router & <helper></string>
      <string>serve</string>
      <string>--config</string>
      <string>/tmp/a & b.toml</string>
  </array>
  <key>RunAtLoad</key>
  <true/>
  <key>KeepAlive</key>
  <true/>
  <key>StandardOutPath</key>
  <string>/tmp/wayfinder-logs/wayfinder-router.log</string>
  <key>StandardErrorPath</key>
  <string>/tmp/wayfinder-logs/wayfinder-router.err.log</string>
</dict>
</plist>

systemd.name: safe
systemd.output:
[Unit]
Description=Wayfinder router gateway
After=network-online.target

[Service]
ExecStart=/usr/bin/wayfinder-router serve --port 8088
Restart=on-failure
RestartSec=2

[Install]
WantedBy=default.target

systemd.name: shell-quoting
systemd.output:
[Unit]
Description=Wayfinder custom gateway
After=network-online.target

[Service]
ExecStart='/opt/my router/wayfinder-router' serve 'it'"'"'s-ready' ''
Restart=on-failure
RestartSec=2

[Install]
WantedBy=default.target

systemd.name: unicode-is-quoted
systemd.output:
[Unit]
Description=Wayfinder router gateway
After=network-online.target

[Service]
ExecStart=/usr/bin/wayfinder-router 'café'
Restart=on-failure
RestartSec=2

[Install]
WantedBy=default.target
